case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. SEPULONA, TUSIGA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SERVED JUN-29-1999, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEPULONA, TUSIGA
